tool_args.label: All Agency General Contract Procurement Guidelines Scope
tool_args.raw_text: These guidelines apply to the Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA), the New York City Transit Authority (NYCT), the Long Island Rail Road Company (LIRR), The Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company (MNR), the Staten Island Rapid Transit Operating Authority (SIRTOA), the Manhattan and Bronx Surface Transit Operating Authority (MaBSTOA), MTA Construction and Development (MTAC&D), MTA Bus Company (MTA Bus), First Mutual Transportation Assurance Co. (FMTAC), Grand Central Madison Concourse Operating Company (GCMC), and the Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority (Bridges and Tunnels).

payload.claim_text: The General Contract Procurement Guidelines apply to MTA, NYCT, LIRR, MNR, SIRTOA, MaBSTOA, MTAC&D, MTA Bus, FMTAC, GCMC, and Bridges and Tunnels.
payload.description: Organizations subject to the All Agency General Contract Procurement Guidelines adopted March 29, 2023.

evidence_refs.source_quote: These guidelines apply to the Metropolitan Transportation Authority ("MTA"), the New York City Transit Authority ("NYCT"), the Long Island Rail Road Company ("LIRR"), The Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company ("MNR"), the Staten Island Rapid Transit Operating Authority ("SIRTOA"), the Manhattan and Bronx Surface Transit Operating Authority ("MaBSTOA"), MTA Construction and Development ("MTAC&D"), MTA Bus Company ("MTA Bus"), First Mutual Transportation Assurance Co. ("FMTAC"), Grand Central Madison Concourse Operating Company ("GCMC"), and the Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority ("Bridges and Tunnels")

tool_args.label: 2023 MTA Mission Statement Report
tool_args.raw_text: Metropolitan Transportation Authority Mission Statement, Measurements, and Performance Indicators Report Covering Fiscal Year 2023

payload.claim_text: The 2023 MTA Mission Statement, Measurements, and Performance Indicators Report is submitted in compliance with New York State Public Authorities Law §2800 and §2824-a as part of the MTA 2023 Annual Report to the Governor.
payload.description: The Mission Statement report covers FY2023 and was submitted in compliance with NYS Public Authorities Law.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metropolitan Transportation Authority Mission Statement, Measurements, and Performance Indicators Report Covering Fiscal Year 2023
In Compliance with New York State Public Authorities Law §2800 and §2824-a Submitted as Part of the MTA 2023 Annual Report to the Governor

tool_args.label: MTA Key Performance Measures Framework
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Strategic Priorities Key Performance Measures: Deliver better service (Weekday Major Incidents, Customer Journey Time Perf., Wait Assessment, Total Ridership, Mean Distance Between Failures, etc.); Promote safety & respect (Customer Injury Rate, Collisions with Injury Rate, Employee Lost Time Rate, etc.); Increase appeal for customers (Elevator Availability, Escalator Availability, AAR Customer Experience, etc.); Provide 21st century bus service (Customer Journey Time, Bus Speeds, Wait Assessment, etc.); Achieve financial stability & viability (Farebox Operating Ratio, Operating Cost per Passenger, etc.); Strengthen & expand the network (Capital Program commitments, Capital Program completions); Revive talent & culture (Female Representatives in Workforce, Minority Representatives in Workforce)

payload.claim_text: MTA measures performance through a framework of Key Performance Measures organized under seven strategic priorities covering subway, bus, paratransit, LIRR, Metro-North, Staten Island Railway, and Bridges and Tunnels operations.
payload.description: The MTA's performance measurement framework linking strategic priorities to specific KPIs across all modes.
